objective: Test whether verified algorithm retrieval plus Qwen adaptation can recover held-out tasks missed by direct sampling.
primary_success_criteria: Semantic retrieval adaptation recovers at least one direct-sampling miss not recovered by random or shuffled retrieval controls.
Oracle over semantic retrieval candidates shows nonzero headroom on direct-sampling misses.
Visible-pass/hidden-fail rate is reported for all retrieval arms.
Direct sampling baseline and retrieval arms are decomposed into coverage, zero-to-one lift, pass@1 proxy, parseability, and forward-token cost.
